spec_match.rationale: The three additional mirrors have been moved inside the same select as real selectedcontent descendants, alongside the normal button mirror.

interactive.rationale: Changing the select updates the displayed mirror log and keeps the selectedcontent descendants populated.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The page accurately describes the Chrome 150 all-descendants clone behavior it now exercises.

edge_cases.rationale: A native support probe distinguishes Chrome 150 multi-clone behavior from older selectedcontent behavior and applies a fallback clone shim only when needed.

references.rationale: Includes links to the feature index, ChromeStatus, and the HTML selectedcontent section.

design_system.rationale: Uses the shared showcase palette and responsive mirror grid.

summary: Resolved: the mirror structure now matches the intended descendant-selectedcontent behavior and remains usable in browsers without native multi-clone support.
